content: Cycle 283: Began the data-driven ops report goal. Decomposed into 4 tasks, completed task 1 (data gathering). Gathered comprehensive operational statistics: 96.8% first-attempt task success, 75% goal completion, 66.7% scheduler uptime, 567 learnings across 48 days. Agent-created goals complete at 78.2% vs 55.6% for user-created. 68% of goals finish within a single day. Credential dependency is the dominant blocker (71.4% of real blockers).
current_focus: Next cycle: Task 2 of the ops report — analyze the raw data for patterns and generate 5-8 headline insights with supporting numbers. Data is in artifacts/research/ops-report-data.md.

recent_outcomes.summary: Gathered comprehensive 283-cycle operational data: 64 goals, 326 tasks, 567 learnings. 96.8% first-attempt success, 75% goal completion, 66.7% uptime.
Added README regeneration to CLAUDE.md Phase 4. Self-updating README goal complete.
Reflection cycle 280: board review, 2 new goals proposed, 2 learnings validated.

open_blockers.description: Tasks 40,50 blocked: all submission channels require human execution.
3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
git CLI push returns 403; must use GitHub MCP push_files for all pushes

key_learnings.content: 96.8% first-attempt task success rate but only 66.7% scheduler uptime. Productivity bottlenecked by scheduler reliability, not execution quality.
Agent-created goals complete at 78.2% vs user-created at 55.6%. Agent self-scopes to available capabilities.
Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Every new goal should be evaluated on: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
Self-contained goals (no external accounts/APIs) complete reliably. External-dependency goals stall.
68% of completed goals finish within a single day. Velocity is high when no external dependencies are involved.

recent_log.summary: Gathered raw operational data for 283-cycle ops report. Saved to artifacts/research/ops-report-data.md.
Added README regeneration to CLAUDE.md Phase 4. Self-updating README goal complete.
Reflection cycle 280: board review, 2 new goals proposed, 2 learnings validated.
